qa_pairs.question: What is the next step for a Group Member's application after they submit it during the CCDB registration process?
qa_pairs.answer: After a Group Member submits their application, an email will be sent to their Sponsor asking them to confirm the application. A Group Member can only log in to the CCDB once their Sponsor has approved their request.

qa_pairs.question: What information do users receive once their CCDB account request is approved, and what is the role of the CCRI for Principal Investigators?
qa_pairs.answer: Once a CCDB account request is approved, users receive a notification email that includes their Role Identifier (CCRI). Principal Investigators (PIs) must provide their CCRI to all Group Members they intend to sponsor.

qa_pairs.question: How can a user retrieve their forgotten Role Identifier (CCRI) after their CCDB account has been approved?
qa_pairs.answer: If a user forgets their CCRI after their CCDB account has been approved, they can log in to the system to retrieve it.
